request.query_text: safety incident reports in New York with supporting narrative

results.text_content: A safety incident follow-up in NYC-TLC references a post-collision inspection of VIN PL4WE4ZKZYYF1RVN7, but the record is an incident narrative for driver DRV-442342416, not an overdue audit finding. Incident narratives should reference trip IDs, timestamps, and any in-app safety tool activations. Stale documentation in the partner portal can cause automatic trip throttling for affected drivers. Auditors may request raw inspection photos and third-party mechanic sign-off forms. City regulators may impose daily fines until proof of correction is uploaded and verified.
